Package org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat

Class TomcatLogger

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat.TomcatLogger
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.apache.juli.logging.Log
public class TomcatLogger extends Object implements org.apache.juli.logging.Log
Implementation of the embedded-Tomcat Log façade based on Logger.

Allows Tomcat to log to the Java Util logging framework (and thus to the main log file defined in the [Logging] section), mirroring the role of org.apache.juneau.marshall.microservice.jetty.JettyLogger in the Jetty module.

Tomcat log levels map to Level values as follows: trace→FINEST, debug→FINE, info→INFO, warn→WARNING, and error/fatal→SEVERE.

See Also:
  • juneau-microservice-tomcat Basics
Since:
10.0.0
